title: Velvet Valley: Femboy Rising
description: A soft survival modpack full of cuteness, magic and queerness. Build, farm, and be fabulous.
body:
Velvet Valley: Femboy Rising is a soft, aesthetic, survival-focused modpack centered around cozy exploration, magical biomes, social NPCs and high visual appeal.
Designed to be lightweight yet immersive, this pack offers over 100 carefully selected mods for farming, building, decor, magic, and romance — all with a soft pastel flair.

Features:

🌸 Biomes O’ Plenty + Terralith + Twilight Forest

🍰 Farmer’s Delight, custom kitchens, cozy food mods

💖 Romanceable NPCs with MCA Reborn and custom personalities

🎀 Decorative blocks, shaders, fox mounts and more

Designed for soft players, cute SMPs, builders and gentle magic lovers.
No OP tech. Just peaceful play and a little sparkle ✨
